entities.name: Product-Market Fit
entities.context: Measure of market pull, not technical robustness; can be achieved through manual execution before automation

entities.name: Manual-to-Product debt
entities.context: Operational debt created when selling manual methodology as finished software; requires high-risk transition from human-driven to automated

entities.name: selling the product before it exists
entities.context: High-leverage founder strategy to find immediate PMF by using humans to execute backend manually

entities.name: living prototypes
entities.context: Treating human operators as system requirements documentation during manual phase

relationships.from: selling the product before it exists
relationships.context: Strategy creates this unique form of operational debt
